mapper.sql: id, exam_name, paper_id, subject_id, creator_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, pass_score, max_switch_count, status, result_published, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from exam where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into exam(exam_name, paper_id, subject_id, creator_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, pass_score, max_switch_count, status, result_published, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{examName}, #{paperId}, #{subjectId}, #{creatorId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{passScore}, #{maxSwitchCount}, #{status}, #{resultPublished}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update exam set exam_name = #{examName}, paper_id = #{paperId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, pass_score = #{passScore}, max_switch_count = #{maxSwitchCount}, status = #{status}, result_published = #{resultPublished}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update exam set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
